locator.quote: WIN markets carry the larger absolute drag (-£189 vs -£111

text: Force-close cost is NOT concentrated in EW: WIN markets carry the larger absolute drag (-£189 vs -£111 across 7 days, single agent).
Force-close RATE: EW = 41.4%, WIN = 70.5% — WIN force-closes ~1.8× as many pairs.

locator.quote: What dominates the EW vs WIN cost difference is the

text: Per-pair force-close cost is essentially identical (~£1.30); what dominates the EW vs WIN cost difference is the rate, not the per-pair magnitude.
